title: Senior Teacher - Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
